name: Enoch Godongwana
notes: Key shareholder representative for all South African SOEs. Oversees Eskom debt relief, Transnet recovery, and SOE governance reforms.

engagements.subject: Eskom Debt Relief Year 3 Tranche — Milestone Review
engagements.attendees: Eskom CEO, CFO, National Treasury DG, NT SOE Unit Director
engagements.summary: Review of Eskom's progress against Year 3 debt relief milestones including EAF improvement and NTDC incorporation.
engagements.outcomes: Year 3 tranche conditionally approved subject to EAF reaching 65% by 31 March 2025.
engagements.followUpActions: Eskom to submit monthly EAF progress reports to National Treasury.

name: Kgosientsho Ramokgopa
notes: Primary ministerial oversight for Eskom. Key decision-maker on energy policy, load shedding, and IPP procurement.

engagements.subject: Load Shedding Elimination Plan — Progress Review
engagements.attendees: Eskom CEO, COO, Minister, Department DG, NERSA CEO
engagements.summary: Review of Eskom's progress towards eliminating load shedding. EAF at 62% — Stage 0 maintained for 45 days.
engagements.outcomes: Minister acknowledged progress; directed Eskom to maintain Stage 0 through winter 2025.
engagements.followUpActions: Eskom to submit weekly EAF and generation status reports to Minister.

name: Maropene Ramokgopa
organization: National Energy Regulator of South Africa (NERSA)
notes: NERSA regulates electricity tariffs, licences, and quality of service. Critical regulator for Eskom. MYPD6 tariff determination process ongoing.

engagements.subject: MYPD6 Tariff Application — Public Hearings
engagements.attendees: Eskom CEO, CFO, Tariff Director, NERSA Chairperson, NERSA Technical Team
engagements.summary: NERSA public hearings on Eskom's MYPD6 tariff application requesting 36% average tariff increase over 3 years.
engagements.outcomes: NERSA acknowledged Eskom's financial pressures; consumer impact assessment initiated.
engagements.followUpActions: Eskom to submit supplementary financial modelling; NERSA to issue determination by March 2025.

name: Pravin Gordhan
organization: Department of Public Enterprises and Economic Planning
notes: DPEPE oversees SOE governance and structural reforms. Key stakeholder for Transnet recovery, SAA strategic equity partnership, and Denel recapitalisation.

engagements.subject: Transnet Private Sector Participation Framework
engagements.attendees: Transnet CEO, CFO, DPEPE DG, NT SOE Unit
engagements.summary: Discussion on private sector participation framework for Durban Container Terminal and Freight Rail corridors.
engagements.outcomes: Framework approved for submission to Cabinet. Durban Container Terminal PSP process to commence Q2 2025.
engagements.followUpActions: Transnet to submit detailed PSP business case by March 2025.
